course_title: INTRODUCTION TO FEEDBACK CONTROL OF AUTONOMOUS SYSTEMS
description: Feedback control theory fundamentals; numerical optimal control algorithms underpinning autonomous systems; quadcopter kinematics  dynamics; quadcopter control and trajectory planning; hands-on labs on a nano quadcopter platform.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: M E 446,E M A 545,E C E 332, or334, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: M E 446,E M A 545,E C E 332, or334, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
